name: Monzo
philosophy: Consumer-fintech with maximum personality — hot coral card is the brand, pill-shape CTAs, illustrated objects with simplified geometry. Children's-book illustration system reading as a neobank.

design_language.motion_signature: 220ms ease-out hover; signature gentle tilt-and-shadow on coral card on scroll-reveal; coin/icon illustrations with subtle hover bounce.

trademark_signals: Hot coral card render — the card is the brand, rendered photorealistically in every hero
Pill-shape CTAs at full radius — never square
Illustrated objects with simplified geometry — coins, plants, characters, hand-drawn-feeling
Industry-first coral circle badges — small, restrained
Cyan/yellow/green accents used in illustration only, never as buttons
ai_slop_avoided: Don't use square buttons — full-pill only
Don't set coral type on white — coral is for surfaces and the card
